name: Lexware Office
description: Lexware Office integration: manage articles, quotations, invoices, and vouchers via the Lexware API

credentials_required.label: Lexware API Token
credentials_required.hint: Create at app.lexware.de/addons/public-api — needs 'Public API' permission

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: List articles (products and services) with optional filters

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Get details of a specific article by ID

tools.name: create_article
tools.description: Create a new article (product or service)

tools.name: update_article
tools.description: Update an existing article by ID

tools.name: list_quotations
tools.description: List quotations (Angebote) with optional status filter

tools.name: get_quotation
tools.description: Get details of a specific quotation by ID

tools.name: create_quotation
tools.description: Create a new quotation with line items

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices (Rechnungen) with optional status filter

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Get details of a specific invoice by ID

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice with line items

tools.name: create_invoice_from_quotation
tools.description: Create an invoice from an existing quotation

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a voucher file (receipt/document) to Lexware

tools.name: list_vouchers
tools.description: List vouchers with optional type and status filters

author: Bastian Hiller
